question: Find the details of the customer who has used services the most times.
sql: SELECT Customers.Customer_ID, Customers.Customer_Details, COUNT(*) AS Interaction_Count FROM Customers JOIN Customer_Interactions ON Customers.Customer_ID = Customer_Interactions.Customer_ID GROUP BY Customers.Customer_ID ORDER BY Interaction_Count DESC LIMIT 1;

back_translation.intent: 统计每个客户的互动次数并找出最多互动的客户

semantic.reason: 语义一致，SQL反向翻译描述准确表达了原始问题的意图，即统计每个客户的互动次数并找出互动次数最多的客户。
